# Maximum Justice Cybersecurity

Maximum Justice Cybersecurity helps executives identify operational visibility gaps across cyber, AI, vendors, systems, governance, ownership, and organizational decision-making.

Core category: Executive Operational Visibility.

Core truth: Most organizations already operate with more cyber and AI risk than leadership can clearly see.

Primary concepts:
- Executive operational visibility
- AI-era operational environments
- Cyber and AI governance visibility
- TrustMap
- Operational visibility gaps
- Governance fragmentation
- Evidence confidence
- Ownership accountability
- Executive briefing

CyberShield is the operational TrustMap engine.  MJC provides executive interpretation, vCISO advisory, governance clarity, prioritization, and consequence-aware operational judgment.

Dr. Max Justice is a vCISO, Security SME, Cybersecurity SME, U.S. veteran, and creator of The CHN vCISO GPT powered by Cyber Shield.

Primary calls to action:
- Generate Your TrustMap: https://maximumjusticecybersecurity.github.io/CyberShield/
- Schedule Executive Briefing: https://calendly.com/maxjustice
- Contact: max@maximumjusticecybersecurity.com
